'''shashobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chabot|chabot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chabot|chabot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shashobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæshebeth|shæshebeth]] || [[word:shæshebej|shæshebej]] || [[word:shæshebesh|shæshebesh]] || [[word:shæshebe|shæshebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shashoshoboth|shashoshoboth]] || [[word:shashoshoboj|shashoshoboj]] || [[word:shashoshobosh|shashoshobosh]] || [[word:shashoshobo|shashoshobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shashoboth|shashoboth]] || [[word:shashoboj|shashoboj]] || [[word:shashobosh|shashobosh]] || [[word:shashobo|shashobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shashofboth|shashofboth]] || [[word:shashofboj|shashofboj]] || [[word:shashofbosh|shashofbosh]] || [[word:shashofbof|shashofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shashobotho|shashobotho]] || [[word:shashobojo|shashobojo]] || [[word:shashobosho|shashobosho]] || [[word:shashoboko|shashoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shashoboth|shashoboth]] || [[word:shashoboj|shashoboj]] || [[word:shashobosh|shashobosh]] || [[word:shashobo|shashobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shashobothol|shashobothol]] || [[word:shashobojol|shashobojol]] || [[word:shashoboshol|shashoboshol]] || [[word:shashobokol|shashobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shashobothotho|shashobothotho]] || [[word:shashobojojo|shashobojojo]] || [[word:shashoboshosho|shashoboshosho]] || [[word:shashoboko|shashoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shashobothon|shashobothon]] || [[word:shashobojon|shashobojon]] || [[word:shashoboshon|shashoboshon]] || [[word:shashobokon|shashobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shashobothoro|shashobothoro]] || [[word:shashobojoro|shashobojoro]] || [[word:shashoboshoro|shashoboshoro]] || [[word:shashobokoro|shashobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
